description: Repeatable infrastructure for chain-scoped restaurant agents (Wok to Walk first) that hand off to Europe-wide Transition Agents. Platform specialists stay shared; each client gets a tenant pack (assist UI, assets, surfaces, handoff map).
principles: Two layers — Transition Agents (platform) vs tenant packs (one chain)
Do not clone seven Transition Agents per restaurant
Wok to Walk is the live reference pack
Tenant agents own local facts; hand off for Europe-wide topics
Always carry chainId / companyId / siteId in handoff briefs when known

waves.name: Registry + W2W pack + API + chain hub shell
Staff admin list of packs + clone wizard docs

userStories.title: Tenant pack registry and W2W manifest
userStories.description: As staff, I want Wok to Walk described as a tenant pack so the next restaurant chain can clone a checklist instead of reinventing agents.

userStories.title: Tenant packs API
userStories.description: As the chain hub and future admin, I want GET APIs for pack list and pack detail.

userStories.title: W2W chain hub shell
userStories.description: As a Wok to Walk operator, I want a pack home that opens Wok Assist and Transition Agent handoffs.
acceptanceCriteria: Hub loads pack from API and lists surfaces + handoff chips

userStories.title: Tenant→platform referral welcomes
userStories.description: As Wok Assist, I want grounded welcome handoffs into Andrieus/Vincent/etc with chain context.
acceptanceCriteria: At least grants + finance + equipment pairs smoke-tested

userStories.title: Agents admin shows tenant packs
userStories.description: As master admin, I want to see registered restaurant packs beside Transition Agents.
acceptanceCriteria: Link to each chain hub and assist route

userStories.title: Second chain pack scaffold
userStories.description: As staff, I want a second pack JSON (even draft) proving the clone checklist works.
acceptanceCriteria: New chainId pack file + registry row
Hub route resolves for that chainId
No Europe schemes duplicated into tenant pack
